---
name: New Skill Request
about: Suggest an idea for a new tech skill
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Skill Name**
Provide a short, catchy name for the skill.

**Objective**
What problem does this skill solve? Why would it be useful for AI agents?

**Proposed Instructions / Prompt**
If you have a draft of the prompt or instructions that the skill should execute, please share it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
